title: 11 Years of Us
subtitle: March 3, 2015 to March 3, 2026. A tiny interactive page for our story.

timeline.title: How We Met
timeline.text: When you asked for my number, neither of us expected what would happen next. We were both shocked when we realized our numbers were almost the same, just one digit different. It felt like the universe was teasing us, like we were always meant to be connected, just one small step away from finding each other. From that tiny difference, something beautiful began.

timeline.title: First Big Adventure
timeline.text: One of my favorite memories will always be when we became partners in our PE class for the Waltz. Dancing with you to Ed Sheeran’s “Thinking Out Loud” felt like something out of a movie. Every step, every shy smile, and every quiet laugh made my heart race in the best way. It wasn’t just a school activity to me, it was the moment I realized how special it felt to hold you close and move in sync, like we were already learning how to dance through life together.

timeline.title: March 3, 2026
timeline.text: 11 years together. Still choosing each other every day.

galleryHint: Moments I never want to forget.
finalMessage: Thank you for being my peace in the middle of everything, my safe place when the world feels heavy, and my best friend through it all. You are the greatest treasure my heart has ever found. Loving you is the easiest and most beautiful thing I’ve ever done, and I’m endlessly grateful that I get to call you mine. 💕
anniversaryMessage: Happy 11th anniversary, my love. Eleven years of laughter, growth, memories, challenges, and choosing each other every single day. Through every season, you have been my constant, my comfort, and my greatest blessing. I am so proud of the love we’ve built and so grateful that it’s you I get to share this life with. Here’s to us, to forever, and to many more beautiful years together. I love you endlessly. ❤️✨
